creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text: Looks like it's an artifact of GNATS to Bugzilla conversion. Looks like there were two separate paths for status translation. On was in transitions parser: if last transition in GNATS status was "open" to "feedback" or open to "suspended" it was recorded as "Open" to "Closed". The other was in bugs fields mapping where "feedback" and "suspended" were mapped to "In Progress"
